recommendations.title: MR-9: Do or Die
recommendations.overview: Elite Bangladeshi CIA agent Masud Rana – codename MR-9 – teams up with an American CIA operative to bring down an international criminal organization headed by a ruthless businessman.

recommendations.title: Society of the Snow
recommendations.overview: On October 13, 1972, Uruguayan Air Force Flight 571, chartered to take a rugby team to Chile, crashes into a glacier in the heart of the Andes.

recommendations.title: Fear Below
recommendations.overview: A rag-tag team of divers attempting to salvage a sunken car from a river are thwarted by a highly aggressive bull shark.

recommendations.title: 1 Night
recommendations.overview: Thirty-something Elizabeth must decide whether to salvage her disappointing relationship with Drew. Meanwhile, Bea, a worrisome teenager, reconnects with her introverted childhood friend, Andy, at their high school prom. Past and present collide as t

recommendations.title: The Double
recommendations.overview: The mysterious murder of a US senator bearing the distinctive trademark of the legendary Soviet assassin 'Cassius', forces retired CIA operative, Paul Shepherson to team with rookie FBI agent, Ben Geary  to solve the crime. Having spent his career ch

recommendations.title: Lord of the Flies
recommendations.overview: When their plane crashes, 25 schoolboys find themselves trapped on a tropical island, miles from civilization.

recommendations.title: Captain Alatriste: The Spanish Musketeer
recommendations.overview: In 17th century Spain Diego Alatriste, a brave and heroic soldier, is fighting in his King's army in the Flandes region. His best mate, Balboa, falls in a trap and, near to death, asks Diego to look after his son and teach him to be a soldier.

recommendations.title: Charlie Countryman
recommendations.overview: A young American falls hard for a Romanian cellist whose father has recently died -- and whose violent past could bring about his own demise.

recommendations.title: Bat*21
recommendations.overview: Lt. Col. Iceal "Ham" Hambleton is a weapons countermeasures expert and when his aircraft is shot over enemy territory the Air Force very much wants to get him back. Hambleton knows the area he's in is going to be carpet-bombed but a temporary shortag

recommendations.title: Cast Away
recommendations.overview: Chuck Noland, a top international manager for FedEx, and Kelly, a Ph.D. student, are in love and heading towards marriage. Then Chuck's plane to Malaysia crashes at sea during a terrible storm. He's the only survivor, and finds himself marooned on a
